page:Q9UKR3.h2:caption: P08217 and Q9Y5K2 Alignment

alnpdb:alignment.info: Aligned P08217 with Q9Y5K2 using PROTSUB. FATCAT alignment shows significant similarity (p-value = 1.44e-15).
